satire_attempt: Welcome to my LinkedIn post about how I cannot transmit my expertise to my junior engineer. Some see the system as wonder, some describe it as wonder, some hear of it as wonder, and some are billing $400/hour as a fractional CTO because they alone have the wonder. Hire me to consult on your tacit knowledge for just $50,000 a quarter.
verdict_reason: The satire requires the verse to license knowledge-hoarding, but the verse explicitly does the opposite: the falsifiability clause forbids using the verse to skip writing runbooks, and the implication actively asks for shadowed on-call rotations and same-week incident retrospectives. The satire would have to invent a version of the verse to land.
